error_signature: Tools agent is missing from AI agent node
title: Missing Tools agent in AI agent node
symptom: The Tools agent is not visible in the dropdown of the AI agent node, while other agents are present. Users may be confused about the absence of this agent type.
not_this_if: The Tools agent was previously available in the node
root_cause: The Tools agent was deprecated and removed from the dropdown menu in the AI agent node starting from version 1.82.1 due to simplification of the agent setup. This change was made to reduce confusion among users regarding agent types.
fix_steps: Create a new AI agent node using the default agent type
Reconnect the model and memory nodes to the new agent
agent_instruction: Create a new AI agent node with the default agent type and reconnect the necessary nodes.
